Dashboard Archive: 2026-04-30 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long AGX dominates today's rankings at #1 with an exceptional score of 96.7, driven by extraordinary long-term returns of 1900.54% over 10 years and 1220.16% over 5 years, while maintaining all four moving average buy signals (SMA 30/50/100/200). The stock demonstrates clean momentum with a 0.6 signal strength and outperforms SPY by 307.08% over 1 year and 1147.71% over 5 years, though the declining ratio_10y_5y of 1.56 suggests growth may be decelerating relative to the prior 5-year period. FTI ranks second with strong near-term momentum (162.4% 1-year return, 987.34% 5-year return) and a ratio_5y_1y of 6.08 indicating sustained acceleration, yet shows concerning weakness in the 10-year timeframe with only 219.53% total return and a negative ratio_10y_5y of 0.22, suggesting this may be a recovery play rather than a secular trend. Both tickers pass all momentum acceleration thresholds and maintain bullish technical positioning, but AGX's consistent multi-decade outperformance appears more aligned with the dashboard
